pi_items.source: Found generated in setup_task.sh and evaluated in verifier.py
States are dynamically generated via python array in setup_task.sh and expected by verifier.py
Task description requests IF and SUMIF, and verifier.py checks for IF, SUMIF, and SUMPRODUCT.

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetically generated dataset of 32 biomass power plant records spanning states CA, FL, GA, ME, MI, and WA. The generated file is saved at /home/ga/Documents/eia923_biomass_data.xlsx. It requires using IF logic for categorizing heat rates and checking for No Gen, along with SUMIF or SUMPRODUCT functions to aggregate generation and fuel consumption by state on a new sheet.
